purpose: Define the fixed flat WUCI-ROOT authority file used by rooted assembly Gate commands to pin a receipt contract group-public-key to the trusted quorum key.
format_constraints: Exactly one 'label: value' field per line.
Labels must appear in field_order exactly.
Labels are lowercase and use hyphen separators.
The file ends with exactly one trailing newline.

value_constraints.authority-id: SHA-256 of the decoded 33-byte group-public-key, encoded as 64 lowercase hex characters
value_constraints.group-public-key: 33-byte compressed SEC1 point encoded as 66 lowercase hex characters
value_constraints.allow-open: literal true or false; rooted open commands require true
value_constraints.allow-release: literal true or false; release-authorized-rooted requires true

assembly_non_goals: Do not parse authority JSON in assembly.
Do not accept signer shares or arbitrary signer manifests.
Do not accept production authority roots.
Do not accept non-open actions through open-authorized-rooted.
Do not accept non-release actions through release-authorized-rooted.
Do not accept trust or publish authority bits yet.
